notifications.pushDescription: Get instant alerts when your order is approved, your withdrawal delivered or additional info is requested.
notifications.iosHint: Notifications work even when you close this tab. On iOS you need to add the site to your home screen from Safari (share icon → “Add to Home Screen”) and then enable notifications from the installed app.

push.unsupportedBrowser: Your browser does not support push notifications
push.permissionBlocked: You blocked notifications. Enable them from your browser settings.
push.vapidError: Could not fetch the VAPID key from the server
push.vapidMissing: Server has no VAPID configured. Contact the administrator.
push.browserRejected: Permission rejected by the browser. Check site settings.
push.browserUnsupported: Push not supported. Try Chrome or Firefox up to date.
push.vapidInvalid: Invalid VAPID key. Contact the administrator.
push.serverRejected: The server rejected the subscription. Contact the administrator.
push.blockedFromSettings: Notifications are blocked. Enable them from your browser settings.

language.label: Language
language.description: The interface switches instantly. Downloaded reports keep the language they were generated in.

defensiveMode.userBanner: Platform under security maintenance. Withdrawals and new registrations are temporarily suspended. Sorry for the inconvenience.

verificationGate.title: Complete your verification to {{action}}
verificationGate.subtitle: By AML/KYC regulation and to protect Resilience Brothers users, we require these 3 verifications before enabling operations. It'll only take a few minutes.
verificationGate.footer: Once you finish each step, this screen will automatically unlock the {{action}} form.

email.label: Verify email
email.hint: Confirm your email from the link we sent when you registered.

phone.label: Verify phone
phone.hint: A staff member must confirm your number. Contact support to speed it up.

kyc.label: Complete KYC
kyc.hint: Upload your ID and a selfie from the verification module.

exchange.title: Crypto ↔ Fiat
exchange.subtitleStandard: Standard rate based on your tier
exchange.uploadHint: Drop file here or click to browse (max 3MB)
exchange.noRatesYet: No rates configured for this pair yet.
exchange.destinationAccount: Destination account — send your payment here:
exchange.senderNameLabel: Account holder who sends the payment
exchange.senderNamePlaceholder: Full name of the sending account holder
exchange.senderNameHint: Required · recorded in the accounting proof and audit trail.
exchange.cashFiatExplainer: We do NOT handle fractional cash. If the calculation yields decimals, we deliver the WHOLE amount and the remainder is credited to YOUR {{code}} balance. You can accumulate it toward a whole amount or convert it to USDT from Balance & Withdrawals (fixed 0.01 USDT commission per conversion, min equivalent 1 USDT).
exchange.orderInReview: Your order #{{id}} is under review by our accounting team.
exchange.detailsHelperGeneric: Include all information required to process the payment.
exchange.accuracyWarning: Please make sure you enter the destination account details correctly. A numbering error may delay or divert the payment.
exchange.noReceivableHint: There are no configured rates for {{code}}. Contact support to open a new pair.

withdraw.title: Withdraw balance
withdraw.subtitle: Convert your accumulated balance into fiat/crypto.
withdraw.detailsHint: Bank + account, or address to deliver cash, or wallet address + network for crypto.
withdraw.totpHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
withdraw.successCreated: Withdrawal request submitted. Our team will contact you shortly.
withdraw.cashReceiverAddressPh: Street, number, cross streets, city, state
withdraw.cashReceiverIdPh: Only if the team asks for it to coordinate
withdraw.networkMismatchHint: Check the selected network or paste another address —
withdraw.cashProgressNote: Cash pickup: will stay In progress until the team marks it Delivered.
withdraw.errReceiverName: Receiver name and surname are required
withdraw.errCryptoNetwork: Select the on-chain network of the withdrawal.
withdraw.err2FA: Enter your 2FA code (6 digits) or recovery code
withdraw.setupNeededToast: You must set up 2FA before withdrawing
withdraw.chooseCorrectNetwork: Choose the correct network. Sending on the wrong network may lose funds permanently.
withdraw.cashHint: The team uses this data to coordinate the cash delivery. Make sure the <1>phone</1> is active and the <2>address</2> is clear.
withdraw.totpHelper: 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or a recovery code.
withdraw.cryptoMismatch: <1>Does not match {{network}}</1>. Check the selected network or paste a different address — sending on the wrong network can lose the funds permanently.

vipView.title: Your accumulated balance
vipView.consolidatedNote: Consolidated equivalent of all your currencies · uses normal rate
vipView.emptyBalances: You have no accumulated balance yet. Create orders with delivery "Accumulate in balance".
vipView.clickToDrilldown: Click a currency to see the orders that credited it.
vipView.ledgerEmpty: No orders registered for this currency.
vipView.dailyClosingSub: Download the PDF report of your approved orders for the day.

orders.title: My Orders
orders.payoutProofTitle: Proof of the payment made to you
orders.payoutFooter: This is the evidence of the payment made by Resilience Brothers to your account/wallet.

0.title: Crypto ↔ Fiat without borders
0.body: Swap USDT, BTC and other cryptos for dollars, euros and pesos. You upload a proof, we confirm in minutes.

1.title: Your VIP balance, in any currency
1.body: Each operation adds to your multi-currency balance. Withdraw whenever you like or use it to redeem products.

2.title: Real merchandise with your balance
2.body: Rice, flour, oil, drinks and more. Turn your digital balance into physical products without going through banks.

appeal.dialogDescription: Write why you believe your account should be reactivated. The staff will read your message and respond as soon as possible. Be clear and provide context (e.g. correct number, apparent reason for the block).
appeal.textareaPlaceholder: e.g. My phone is correct and does not match the blocked list; I can verify by WhatsApp.
appeal.alreadyPendingBanner: You already have a pending appeal. Staff is reviewing it. Wait for the response before sending another.
appeal.historyEmpty: You haven't sent any appeal yet.
appeal.errTooShort: Tell us in more detail (minimum 10 characters).
appeal.successToast: Appeal sent. Staff will review it soon.
appeal.errAlreadyPending: You already have a pending appeal. Wait for the staff's response.

profile.userIdShareHint: Share this identifier when you submit an appeal or request support — it helps us locate your case faster.
profile.title: Personal data

email.codeSent: Code sent. Check your new email.
email.helperBody: We'll send a 6-digit code to your new email + an alert to the current one ({{email}}) so you can revert if someone tries to hijack your account.
email.step2Body: We sent a code to <1>{{target}}</1>. Enter it below to confirm the change.

phone.requestSent: Request submitted. Wait for team approval.
phone.pendingRequestBody: You already have a pending request for <1>{{phone}}</1>. The team will review and approve manually.
phone.currentLabelBody: Current: <1>{{phone}}</1>. The team will verify the new number before applying it — same as when you first registered.

country.resetsKyc: Country updated. Your KYC was reset to 'under review'.
country.currentLabelBody: Current: <1>{{country}}</1>. You can update it if you change residency.
country.willResetKycBody: Your KYC is approved. Changing country will send it back to <1>"Under review"</1> so the team can confirm documents in the new jurisdiction.

profile.headerBody: All the data you registered with. You can update them if you change country, phone or email — we only require additional verification to protect your account.
profile.kycHelperBody: Upload your documents to unlock higher limits and operate without friction. Review usually takes 30 min to 24 h.
profile.securityHelperBody: Manage your two-factor authentication, change your password and view active sessions.

common.notEnoughPermissions: You don't have permission for this action

users.title: Client Management
users.notVerifiedTitle: The user hasn't verified their email yet
users.verifyTitle: Mark this email as manually verified (requires 2FA)
users.functionsTitle: Configure role, permissions, currencies and access
users.totpDescriptionVerify: You are going to manually verify {{email}}'s email. Enter your 2FA code.

orders.title: P2P Operations Queue
orders.dialogDesc: Review the payment proof and confirm or reject the operation.
orders.payoutHelperTransfer: Attach the bank screenshot proving you sent the {{code}} to the client. Required before marking as completed.
orders.payoutHelperCrypto: Paste only the transaction hash — that's enough, no screenshot needed. The client can verify it on the on-chain explorer.
orders.alreadyDone: This order was already {{status}}. Only an admin can revert its status.
orders.totpDescription: This order requires double approval. Enter your 2FA code to confirm.
orders.networkClientNotDeclared: The client did NOT declare the network. Contact them before sending.
orders.networkSendOn: Send on the {{net}} network. Verify the destination wallet accepts it.

kycAdmin.title: Identity verification (KYC)
kycAdmin.subtitle: Verification queue. Use <1>J</1>/<2>K</2> to navigate, <3>A</3> approve, <4>R</4> reject, <5>X</5> mark for batch, <6>?</6> to see all shortcuts.
kycAdmin.bulkNoSelection: Select verifications by marking with X or the checkbox.
kycAdmin.bulkPartialFail: {{n}} were not approved (possibly no longer pending).
kycAdmin.actionDesc: Compare the data declared by the user (left) against the uploaded document (right).
kycAdmin.notesMoreInfo: Explain what you need from the client
kycAdmin.notesMoreInfoPh: e.g. The back photo came out cropped, please re-upload with better lighting.
kycAdmin.reasonRequired: Select at least one rejection reason.
kycAdmin.moreInfoMin: Explain what info is missing (minimum 5 characters).
kycAdmin.toastMoreInfo: Requested more info from the client

reject_reasons.invalid_country: Document not valid for this country

kycAdmin.shortcutsDesc: Designed to review the queue without lifting your hands off the keyboard.

capitalRequests.title: Operating capital — VIPs
capitalRequests.subtitle: On approval, the amount is credited to the client's VIP balance and debited from the company fund. Every accumulated order automatically deducts the configured % until the debt is cleared.
capitalRequests.emptyFiltered: No requests match the applied filters.
capitalRequests.discountHelper: Every time the VIP completes an accumulated order in {{code}}, this percentage will be deducted from the credited amount and applied to the debt.
capitalRequests.rejectReasonPh: Explain to the client why it is rejected (minimum 5 chars)
capitalRequests.rejectReasonInvalid: Rejection reason must be at least 5 characters.
capitalRequests.totpDescription: Enter your 2FA code to confirm this action on the company fund.

withdrawals.title: Withdrawals & Redemptions
withdrawals.dialogDesc: Manage the withdrawal and attach evidence of payment to the client.
withdrawals.payoutEvidence: Evidence of payment to the client
withdrawals.captureLabel: Screenshot of the executed bank transfer
withdrawals.hashHelper: The hash is enough — no screenshot needed. The client can verify it on the explorer.
withdrawals.explorerHint: verify the tx reached the client's wallet
withdrawals.askProofTransfer: Attach the transfer screenshot before marking as paid
withdrawals.askProofCrypto: Attach transaction hash or screenshot before marking as delivered
withdrawals.totpDescription: Modifying a withdrawal moves real money. Enter your 2FA code to continue.

currencies.title: Crypto & Fiat
currencies.name: Name
currencies.deliveryHelper: If you leave all blank, the system detects automatically by name (transfer/cash/wallet).
currencies.convertibleHelper: If disabled, clients will NOT be able to convert their balances into this currency (useful for inbound-only currencies like Zelle). Does not affect P2P orders or withdrawals.

rates.title: Exchange Rate
rates.realRateHelper: Used only to compute business revenue. Optional.
rates.totpDescription: Editing rates impacts all clients. Enter your 2FA code.

products.title: Products
products.name: Name
products.imageNoPerm: Permission required — ask an admin to enable "Images" on your account.
products.priceNoPerm: Permission required — ask an admin to enable "Prices" on your account.
products.toastNoDelete: You don't have permission to delete products
products.noDeletePerm: You don't have permission to delete products
products.noPriceEdit: You don't have permission to modify prices
products.noImageEdit: You don't have permission to change images

security.title: Security Audit
security.staffSessionsDesc: Non-expired sessions of admins and employees. Revoke any you don't recognize.
security.revokeConfirm:
Revoke ALL sessions of {{email}}?
The user will have to log in again.
security.loadError: Could not load the security panel
security.cfLoadError: Could not load the Cloudflare blocklist
security.newIpDesc: An admin or employee signed in from an IP we hadn't seen in the last 90 days. Verify it's legitimate.
security.topRateLimitedDesc: The 10 IPs with most 429 hits in the last 7 days. Consider blocking them on Cloudflare if abusive.
security.originViolationsDesc: POST/PUT/DELETE blocked for coming from a not-allowed Origin. Each line is a potential CSRF attempt.
security.loginBurstsDesc: Identifiers with most failed attempts in the last 7 days. High counts may indicate credential-stuffing.
security.blocklistDesc: IPs blocked at app level: any request from these IPs gets 403 before touching business logic. The auto-scanner can add them when it detects floods. If you also configure Cloudflare (CF_API_TOKEN + CF_ZONE_ID), the block is also applied at the edge.
security.unblockConfirm:
Unblock {{ip}}?
The Cloudflare rule (if applicable) will be removed and the record moves to 'deleted'.
security.cfDialogInfo: ℹ️ The block will be applied at <1>app level</1> (403 before business logic). If you also configure <2>CF_API_TOKEN</2> and <3>CF_ZONE_ID</3>, the block replicates to Cloudflare's edge for defense-in-depth.
security.cfAlready: IP {{ip}} was already on the blocklist
security.cfBoth: IP {{ip}} blocked in app + Cloudflare WAF

audit.title: Action Log
audit.subtitle: Full traceability: every change to orders, rates, users and settings is logged with author and exact moment.

health.title: Health Dashboard
health.subtitle: One-view of operational state. Refreshes every 60 s.

blocked.title: Blocked contacts
blocked.subtitle: List of vetted phones and emails. If a phone is here, its owner cannot operate on the platform.
blocked.searchPh: Search by phone, name, email, reason...
blocked.removeConfirm: Remove this block? The contact will be able to register again.
blocked.atLeastOne: Indicate at least one: phone and/or email.
blocked.needPhoneOrEmail: Indicate at least a phone or an email
blocked.importDesc: Paste the WhatsApp chat as-is. The system will auto-detect phones, names and reasons.
blocked.importPh: Paste the full WhatsApp message here...
blocked.importFooter: Duplicates are ignored. Active accounts matching imported numbers are moved to review automatically.
blocked.importAffected: ⚠️ <1>{{n}}</1> active account(s) on the platform matched imported numbers. They've been moved to <2>"under review"</2> automatically and cannot operate until an authorized staff member re-verifies them.
blocked.allDuplicates: All contacts were already in the list

companyFunds.title: Operating capital by currency
companyFunds.subtitle: Balance = inflows (confirmed orders + own contributions) − delivered to clients (P2P + VIP and normal client withdrawals) − company outflows.
companyFunds.exportSub: Download every company-fund adjustment and withdrawal in the selected date range.
companyFunds.exportHint: Empty dates = full history. UTF-8 with BOM (Excel-friendly).
companyFunds.closingSub: Confidential report for partners and auditors. Includes treasury, withdrawals and revenue by currency.
companyFunds.closingHint: No dates = full history. PDF is signed and stamped by Resilience Brothers.
companyFunds.totpDesc: This operation affects the company capital. Enter your 2FA code.

revenue.title: Business Profit
revenue.subtitle: Profit calculated as the difference between the <1>real exit rate</1> (market) and the rate delivered to the client. Only approved/completed orders with real rate set are counted.
revenue.statsTitle: Monthly comparison + bar chart + top category + top currency
revenue.missingRealBody: These pairs have orders but do NOT have real rate configured — their profit is not counted:
revenue.missingRealHint: Set them in the Rates section → edit pair → "Real Exit Rate".
revenue.sendReportDesc: The selected month's PDF will be emailed to ALL admins. Enter your 2FA code.
revenue.byPairSubtitle: Sorted by contribution to profit. Average margin: {{pct}}% · {{n}} orders.
revenue.byPairEmpty: Not enough data. Configure real rates and approve orders.
revenue.dailySubtitle: Profit consolidated per day (P2P + Marketplace + USDT commissions).
revenue.monthlySubtitle: Download the daily detail of each month in CSV or PDF. On the 1st of each month at 09:00 UTC the previous month's PDF is emailed to all admins.
revenue.mpSubtitle: Only delivered redemptions (status=delivered). Configure the «Cost» field on each product.
revenue.mpEmpty: No delivered redemptions in this period yet.
revenue.analyticsDialogDesc: Monthly comparison, categories (marketplace / P2P / conversions) and the currency that contributes the most. The data matches the period filter active in the main view.
revenue.analyticsPdfTitle: Download executive report as PDF (with chart)
revenue.categoryContribution: Contribution by category · Net total {{value}} USDT
revenue.catNote: Percentages represent the magnitude relative to the absolute total. Faded bars indicate net loss.

profileChanges.title: Profile change requests
profileChanges.subtitle: Clients who requested a phone number change. Verify they actually contacted the team before approving.
profileChanges.rejectHelper: The client will get a notification with the reason. Be clear to avoid support tickets.
profileChanges.rejectPh: e.g. Supporting document does not match the account holder.
profileChanges.totpDesc: This action modifies sensitive client data. Enter your 2FA code to continue.

adminOverview.title: Admin Dashboard
adminOverview.subtitle: Consolidated view of operations · values in USDT as base.

alerts.title: Automatic Alerts
alerts.body: When a VIP client accumulates (in USDT) a balance equal to or greater than this threshold, all admins will receive an alert (push + email).
alerts.opsMailHint: If set, <1>all</1> operational emails (new order, withdrawal, VIP conversion, margin alert, accumulated pending, monthly close) go to this single inbox. Admins' personal emails are only used for login, 2FA and personal notices. Leave empty to return to per-admin fan-out.
alerts.auditBody: When <1>active</1>, every day <2>1st at 09:15 UTC</2> the previous month's audit PDF is emailed to the ops inbox (or to all admins if not configured). You can turn this off if you prefer to download it manually from <3>Audit → Monthly report</3>.
alerts.totpDescription: Modifying the threshold or defensive margin is a global action. Enter your 2FA code.
alerts.totpAuditOnDesc: The monthly audit report will be sent on the 1st at 09:15 UTC. Enter your 2FA code to confirm.
alerts.totpAuditOffDesc: By disabling, you will stop receiving the monthly report by email. Enter your 2FA code to confirm.

cards.inflowSub: Total clients have sent to the platform

adminAppeals.title: Appeals
adminAppeals.subtitle: Messages from clients under review asking for reactivation. Resolving here <1>does not</1> reactivate the account — use <2>Verify phone</2> in Users when you decide to activate.
adminAppeals.emptyQueue: There are no appeals in this queue.

action.clientHint: The client will receive your reply as an in-app + push notification.
action.approveWarning: ⚠️ Approving the appeal does NOT activate the account. You must go to <1>Users → Verify phone</1> separately.
action.placeholderApprove: e.g. Thanks for your appeal — we'll activate your account in the next few hours.
action.placeholderReject: e.g. You are still on the blocked list due to prior reports. Contact us via WhatsApp.
action.emptyResponseError: Write a response for the client.

adminQueue.title: Pending items in your scope
adminQueue.subtitle: Only pending items within your authorized currencies. Admins see everything.
adminQueue.emptyBody: No orders or withdrawals pending in your scope.

orders.showingOf: Showing 50 of {{count}} — see the rest in /admin/orders

myTransactions.title: My Transactions
myTransactions.subtitle: Record of your inflows, outflows and balance conversions, all in one place.

table.empty: You don't have any registered transactions yet.
table.emptyFiltered: No results for the applied filters

detail.title: Detail
detail.outflowsHaveNoProof: Outflows don't include an incoming transfer proof.

allBalances.title: All my balances
allBalances.subtitle: Full view of your wallet, sorted by USDT equivalent.
allBalances.empty: You don't have any positive wallet balances yet.

underReview.title: Account under review
underReview.body: Your account is not active yet. A staff member must verify your phone before you can operate (exchanges, withdrawals and redemptions are temporarily disabled). If you've been waiting more than 24h, contact support via WhatsApp.

blocked.title: Account blocked
blocked.body: Your account has been blocked by the team. If you believe this is a mistake, contact support.

security.title: Two-Factor Verification
security.subtitle: Protect your withdrawals with a code generated by an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, etc.). Required for withdrawals.
security.statusOffHint: You won't be able to withdraw until you activate it.

setup.step2: Step 2: Confirm with the first code

recovery.title: Save these recovery codes
recovery.warning: They are only shown <1>once</1>. Use them to log in if you lose your authenticator. Each code works only once.

disableDialog.title: Deactivate 2FA
disableDialog.body: If you deactivate 2FA, you won't be able to withdraw until you reactivate it. Enter your current code to confirm.

password.title: Change password
password.body: Changing it will close all your other active sessions. You'll receive an email notification.
password.needsTwofaHint: To change your password, first activate two-factor verification (2FA) above. This protects your account against unauthorized changes.
password.googleBody: Your account uses <1>Google</1> sign-in. Change your password from your Google account.
password.tooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters.
password.mismatch: Confirmation doesn't match the new password.
password.mustDiffer: The new password must be different from the current one.
password.setupRequired: Activate two-factor verification (2FA) before changing your password.
password.updatedWithSessions: Password updated. {{count}} additional sessions were closed.

marketplace.title: Redeem your balance
marketplace.subtitle: Turn your USD balance into products with home delivery.
marketplace.empty: No products available yet — check back soon.

kyc.title: Verify your identity (KYC)
kyc.subtitle: Upload 3 photos to verify your identity. Your documents are stored encrypted and only the review team can view them.
kyc.uploadHint: PNG or JPG, max 5MB. Make sure the image is clear.
kyc.successSubmitted: Verification submitted. We'll notify you when it's reviewed.
kyc.canResubmit: You can resubmit the verification with new documents below.
kyc.contactSupport: Contact the team from the support chat with the requested info.
kyc.successToast: Verification submitted. Our team will review it within ≤48h.
kyc.pendingMessage: Your verification is being reviewed. You'll receive a notification when there's an answer.
kyc.verifiedMessage: Your identity is verified ✓ — you can operate without reduced limits.

id_front.label: Front of document
id_front.hint: Clear photo of the front side of your national ID / DNI / passport. Name and number must be readable.

id_back.label: Back of document
id_back.hint: Photo of the back side. If it's a passport, re-upload the photo page.

selfie.label: Selfie with document
selfie.hint: Photo of yourself holding the document next to your face. Good lighting, no filters.

dashboard.accountStandard: Standard Account · Rate based on your tier

balanceConverter.title: Convert Balances
balanceConverter.minSource: Minimum per conversion: equivalent to {{min}} USDT.
balanceConverter.dialogDescription: Move funds between your own currencies at the {{tier}} rate. Every conversion carries a flat {{fee}} USDT fee and a minimum equivalent to {{min}} USDT.
balanceConverter.insufficientUsdtSelf: Insufficient USDT balance. You have {{balance}} USDT — need at least the amount you want to convert plus {{fee}} USDT for the fixed commission.
balanceConverter.insufficientUsdtOther: You need at least {{fee}} USDT in your balance to pay the commission. You have {{balance}} USDT — top up USDT first.

dustSweep.title: Convert small balances to USDT
dustSweep.subtitle: Sweep every balance worth less than {{threshold}} USDT into USDT in a single operation.
dustSweep.emptySubtitle: You have no balances worth less than {{threshold}} USDT.
dustSweep.feeGuard: You need at least {{fee}} USDT to pay the fee. You have {{balance}} USDT.

hero.descriptionA: We power international ecommerce and help businesses and individuals capture opportunities in global markets with integrated payment, settlement and logistics solutions —
hero.emailFallback: Google blocked in your region? Use <1>email access</1> — instant signup, no third parties.

about.title: An operational bridge between markets.
about.description: We connect businesses and individuals with integrated payment, settlement and international commerce solutions. We enable cross-border ecommerce operations through a curated network of strategic partners across multiple jurisdictions.
about.globalDescription: We power international ecommerce by connecting businesses with growth opportunities across global markets through a network of verified strategic partners in every jurisdiction.
about.proofsDescription: Every operation requires proof with the account holder name. Our compliance team confirms funds before release.
about.settlementDescription: Approved operations settle in hours, not days.
about.dynamicRatesDescription: Rates updated in real time by our team. VIP clients access preferential pricing.
about.goodsDescription: Redeem your VIP balance for goods and logistics from our partner network: consumer packaged goods, raw materials and more.

services.title: Two platforms. One flow.
services.cryptoDescription: End-to-end payment solutions for businesses and individuals: international transfers, multi-currency settlement and B2B settlement through our global network.
cryptoBullets: Live rates managed by our team
Human confirmation by our compliance team
Settlement via transfer, cash or digital assets
services.marketplaceDescription: Tap into our strategic partner network for international ecommerce operations: redeem your VIP balance for goods and global logistics.
marketplaceBullets: No commission, no courier fees for VIPs

steps.d: Pick the operation, enter the amount and verify your live rate.
A screenshot of the transfer showing the account holder name.
Our compliance team confirms the incoming payment.
Transfer, cash, digital assets — or accumulate into VIP balance.

vipSection.title: Built for high volume.
vipSection.descriptionA: If you have your own clients and process multiple daily trades, the Resilience Brothers VIP program removes the friction:
vipSection.descriptionHighlight: no commission, preferential rates, accumulated balance
vipSection.descriptionB: plus the option to redeem for physical goods.

cta.title: Ready to scale your operation?
cta.subtitle: One account. Full access. No banking friction.
